title: phlomis × composita var. trullenquei
intro: Phlomis × composita var. trullenquei is a plant species that is a hybrid of Phlomis composita, a type of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlomis × composita var. trullenquei include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and aid in digestion, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
